2605.28632.title: Blind PRNG Hijacking: An Undetectable Integrity-Preserving Attack Against LLM Watermarking
2605.28632.paper_summary: Cryptographic watermarking is a leading defense for attributing text generated by large language models (LLMs). Existing schemes, including KGW, Unigram, and DipMark, derive their security guarantees from the assumption that the underlying pseudo-random number generator (PRNG) is trustworthy. This work introduces SeedHijack, the first supply-chain attack on LLM watermarking that is simultaneously (i) blind -- requiring no knowledge of the watermark key, detector, or model logits, (ii) integrity-preserving -- amplifying rather than erasing the watermark signal, and (iii) orthogonal to detection -- the attack-induced bias is statistically independent of all content-side detector statistics, ensuring that amplification and evasion coexist without trade-off. Rather than perturbing generated text, SeedHijack replaces the PRNG at the supply-chain layer, biasing green-list selection without altering output tokens or degrading text quality. Across three watermarking schemes and three open-source LLMs, the attack triggers 0/6 state-of-the-art content-side statistical detectors while inflating the watermark z-score up to 2.42x (system-level defenses such as entropy-source attestation remain orthogonal and complementary). A quantum random number generator (QRNG) countermeasure is shown to fully neutralize the attack while preserving benign watermarking utility. These findings establish PRNG integrity as a first-class security requirement for cryptographic content-provenance systems.
2605.28632.paper_summary_zh: 加密水印技術是歸屬於大型語言模型（LLMs）生成文本的主要防禦措施。現有的方案，包括KGW、Unigram和DipMark，基於假設底層的偽隨機數生成器（PRNG）是可信的，來推導其安全性保證。本研究介紹了SeedHijack，這是對LLM水印的首個供應鏈攻擊，並且同時具備以下特點：(i) 盲目性——不需要了解水印密鑰、檢測器或模型邏輯，(ii) 完整性保護——放大而非抹去水印信號，以及(iii) 與檢測正交——攻擊引起的偏差在統計上與所有內容側檢測器統計數據獨立，確保放大和逃避共存而不需妥協。SeedHijack並不是擾動生成的文本，而是在供應鏈層替換PRNG，偏向綠名單選擇，而不改變輸出標記或降低文本質量。在三個水印方案和三個開源LLM中，該攻擊觸發了0/6個最先進的內容側統計檢測器，同時將水印z-score提升至2.42倍（系統級防禦如熵源驗證仍然是正交和互補的）。量子隨機數生成器（QRNG）對策被證明能完全中和該攻擊，同時保留良性水印的效用。這些發現確立了PRNG的完整性作為加密內容來源系統的一級安全要求。
2605.28632.author: Ziyang You et.al.
2605.28632.authors: Ziyang You, Huilong He, Xiaoke Yang, Xuxing Lu
